overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open grassland. The character encounters a horse-drawn carriage and later two riders on horseback while passing a large solitary tree, with distant mountains visible in the background under a bright sun.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two occupants approaches from ahead and passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward the large tree in the distance

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the trail, passing the character on the right

entered.detail: large solitary oak tree standing prominently in the middle distance ahead
worn dirt path with visible wheel ruts cutting through the grassland
rolling green prairie extending to the horizon on both sides of the trail
hazy mountain peaks visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grassland under a bright sun. A horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the right, while a large oak tree stands prominently in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail passing large oak tree

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the large oak tree passes by on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the trail, passing the large oak tree which now stands to the left. The distant mountains become more prominent in the center of the view as the trail curves slightly through the open grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with approaching riders

events.description: two riders on horseback approach from ahead and pass by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking as two riders on horses approach and pass by on the trail

notable_agents.action: two riders on horses approaching and passing by on the trail

segments.scene_description: Two riders on horseback appear in the distance and approach along the trail, passing the character on the right. The large oak tree remains visible far to the left while the trail continues through the open prairie.

agents.ego_description: walking through open prairie toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: rocky outcrops and hills visible on the right side of the valley

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the trail as the landscape opens into a wide valley. The large oak tree is left behind, and the distant mountains become more prominent ahead while rocky hills appear on the right horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from a grassland path into a wide, mountainous valley. It begins with the character walking under a bright sun as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, heading toward a prominent oak tree in the distance. As the character advances, the camera passes the oak tree to the left, allowing the distant mountains to become more centered and prominent as the trail curves through the prairie. The scene then shifts as two riders on horseback approach and pass on the right, while the oak tree recedes further into the distance. Finally, the landscape opens into a broad valley, leaving the tree behind as the mountains loom larger ahead and rocky hills emerge on the right horizon.
